_comment: GMSTs deliberately left in Latin script, with the technical reason. Regex keys match the setting id. Anything not matched here and not translated is a gap, not a decision.
^sKeyName_: labels of physical keyboard keys - they must match what is printed on the key
^sMagic.*ID$: record ids the engine looks up to spawn summons and bound items - translating breaks the spell
^sQuick[0-9]Xbox$: unused Xbox stubs whose value is literally their own setting id
^sXTimes$: the multiplier symbol x, not a word
^sLevelUpMenu3$: the multiplier x2, not a word
^sLevelUpMenu4$: the multiplier x3, not a word
